acceptance_criteria: local=true filters to local accounts; federated includes remote; replies and boosts excluded; only_media filter works
description:
Public timeline shows public posts. local=true: only local accounts' public posts. local=false (default): all public posts including cached remote_posts. only_media=true: only posts with media attachments. Excludes boosts (boost wrappers in public timeline are noisy). Excludes replies.

Test discipline:
- Insert local public post + remote public post → both appear in federated timeline
- local=true → only local post
- only_media=true → only posts with media_attachments
- Reply (in_reply_to_id set) → excluded from public timeline
- Boost wrapper (boost_of_id set) → excluded

Defensive programming:
- Only include posts with visibility='public' — never include private or direct in public timeline
title: Public timeline: local=true/false, only_media filter
